message:
fix(pipeline): improve output extraction robustness

- Update extractNewOutput to handle partial/scrolled overlaps correctly
- Use suffix/prefix matching with optimization for large outputs
- Fix internal/supervisor tests missing import and bd check
- Fix internal/resilience monitor auto-restart logic
- Closes ntm-jdw1

 {"id":"ntm-jda","title":"Implement context usage tracking for agents","description":"# Implement Context Usage Tracking for Agents

## Purpose

Track estimated context usage per agent for visualization.

## Approach

1. Capture pane scrollback (visible conversation)
2. Apply token estimation
3. Apply overhead multiplier
4. Store with confidence indicator

```go
package context

type AgentContext struct {
    PaneID        string
    Model         string
    VisibleTokens int       // From scrollback
    EstimatedUsed int       // With overhead
    ContextLimit  int       // Model's limit
    Confidence    string    // "low", "medium" - never "high"
    LastUpdated   time.Time
}

type Tracker struct {
    contexts map[string]*AgentContext
    mu       sync.RWMutex
}

func (t *Tracker) Update(paneID, model string, scrollback string) *AgentContext {
    visible := tokens.EstimateTokens(scrollback)
    
    // Conservative overhead: 2.5x visible
    // System prompts, tool defs, hidden context
    estimated := tokens.EstimateWithOverhead(scrollback, 2.5)
    
    ctx := &AgentContext{
        PaneID:        paneID,
        Model:         model,
        VisibleTokens: visible,
        EstimatedUsed: estimated,
        ContextLimit:  tokens.GetContextLimit(model),
        Confidence:    "low", // Always low - we're estimating
        LastUpdated:   time.Now(),
    }
    
    t.mu.Lock()
    t.contexts[paneID] = ctx
    t.mu.Unlock()
    
    return ctx
}
```

## Scrollback Capture

```go
func CaptureScrollback(paneID string, maxLines int) (string, error) {
    // tmux capture-pane -t {paneID} -p -S -{maxLines}
    cmd := exec.Command("tmux", "capture-pane", 
        "-t", paneID, "-p", "-S", fmt.Sprintf("-%d", maxLines))
    output, err := cmd.Output()
    return string(output), err
}
```

## Usage Levels

Instead of exact percentages, use qualitative levels:
```go
func (c *AgentContext) UsageLevel() string {
    pct := float64(c.EstimatedUsed) / float64(c.ContextLimit) * 100
    switch {
    case pct < 40:
        return "Low"
    case pct < 70:
        return "Medium"
    case pct < 85:
        return "High"
    default:
        return "Critical"
    }
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Scrollback capture via tmux
- [ ] Token estimation applied
- [ ] Overhead multiplier (configurable, default 2.5x)
- [ ] Qualitative usage levels (Low/Medium/High/Critical)
- [ ] Confidence always "low" (honest about estimates)
- [ ] Thread-safe tracker","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SapphireRiver","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:26:10.903539-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-10T04:20:37.674483-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-10T04:20:37.674483-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-jda","depends_on_id":"ntm-cyq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:26:23.324989-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}

 {"id":"ntm-je6","title":"EPIC: Git Coordination Layer","description":"# Git Coordination Layer

## Background & Motivation

When multiple agents edit the same codebase concurrently, git conflicts are inevitable:
- Agent A modifies src/api/users.py
- Agent B simultaneously modifies the same file
- One commit overwrites the other, or merge conflicts arise

## Integration Levels

This EPIC has TWO levels:

### Level 1: Basic Git Visibility (No Agent Mail Required)
- `ntm git status`: Show git state per agent pane
- `ntm git sync`: Pull/push across panes
- Works without Agent Mail

### Level 2: Coordinated Locking (Requires Agent Mail)
- `ntm lock`: Reserve files via Agent Mail
- `ntm unlock`: Release reservations
- Conflict detection before spawn
- Pre-commit guard integration

## Commands

### ntm git status (Level 1)
```bash
ntm git status myproject
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Git Status: myproject                                       │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Branch: feature/auth                                        │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Pane      │ Modified │ Staged │ Status                     │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ cc_1      │ 3 files  │ 1 file │ uncommitted changes       │
│ cc_2      │ 0 files  │ 0 files│ clean                      │
│ cod_1     │ 2 files  │ 0 files│ uncommitted changes       │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### ntm git sync (Level 1)
```bash
ntm git sync myproject
# Pulls latest in all panes (with user confirmation)
# Shows conflicts if any

ntm git sync myproject --check
# Preview what would happen, don't execute
```

### ntm lock / ntm unlock (Level 2 - Requires Agent Mail)
```bash
ntm lock myproject "src/api/**" --reason "Refactoring"
ntm unlock myproject --all
ntm locks myproject  # Show all reservations
```

If Agent Mail unavailable:
```
⚠️ File locking requires Agent Mail (not detected)
  Start Agent Mail: mcp-agent-mail serve
  Or continue without locking (not recommended for multi-agent work)
```

## Graceful Degradation

| Feature | Agent Mail Available | Agent Mail Unavailable |
|---------|---------------------|----------------------|
| ntm git status | Full (with locks) | Basic (git only) |
| ntm git sync | Full | Full |
| ntm lock/unlock | Works | Error with help |
| Conflict prevention | Works | Not available |

## Success Criteria

- [ ] ntm git status shows per-pane git state
- [ ] ntm git sync pulls across panes safely
- [ ] Level 2 features require Agent Mail (with helpful errors)
- [ ] Graceful degradation documented
- [ ] Pre-commit guard optional","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:27:30.523699-05:00","updated_at":"2026-01-03T12:21:24.953384-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-15T23:41:07.981273-05:00","close_reason":"All features already implemented: git status, git sync, lock, unlock, locks commands. Fixed compilation bug in mail.go during verification.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-je6","depends_on_id":"ntm-vum","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:29:38.953187-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}
